title: Knightcrawler Metadata Service and IMDB Data Refresh
wikilinks: Copilot Session Checkpoint: Fixing Knightcrawler Populate Cron and RD Playback
summary: The Knightcrawler metadata service is a one-shot process that downloads IMDB TSV data dumps and imports episode metadata into the Knightcrawler database. It truncates existing metadata tables and fully refreshes them, providing up-to-dat...
